visual_description: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair is seated upright in a hospital bed, wearing a patterned hospital gown and a wristband. She rests her hands on her abdomen and gazes toward the left side of the frame. The bed has a white sheet draped over the headboard, and part of a brown leather object is visible in the lower-left corner.
